response: {"proposal_name":"Tideception (Gravity-Gradient Sense)","physical_basis":"Detection of spatial gradients in the gravitational field (the tidal tensor), via distributed mechanosensors that measure minute differential accelerations across separated points in the body (e.g., head-to-torso, left-to-right). This modality would be essential for navigating complex temporal environments, such as those found in nature, and would have significant implications for fields like biology, ecology, and psychology."}
